title: provenance.read
description: Read-side contract returning the field-level provenance trail for a Data Asset. Mirrors ProvenancedValue<T> from data-model.md (§ProvenancedValue) and research.md §4. Inline history is bounded per origin tag; older entries are archived to the `provenance_history_archive` table and retrievable via the archive query path referenced by `history_truncated`.

AssetType.description: target added for alias and primary_designation provenance tracking (R-3.2).

value.description: Prior value at the time the entry was recorded. JSON-typed.

source_id.description: Opaque reference to the originating source (e.g. file_record id, plan id, reviewer id).

replaced_by.description: Optional pointer to the entry that superseded this one (e.g. an audit_id or a sibling entry id).

field_path.description: Dotted path to the field on the asset (e.g. `frame_kind`, `metadata.exposure`).

current.description: The effective current value (priority `reviewed > inferred > observed`).

source_id.description: Opaque reference to the source that produced the current value.

history.description: Most recent N entries per origin tag, newest first. Older entries are archived to `provenance_history_archive` and signaled by `history_truncated`.

history_truncated.description: True if older entries for this field exist in the archive table. Archive entries are retrievable via the archive query path documented in data-model.md §ProvenanceHistoryArchive.

Request.description: Read request for one asset's provenance.

field_paths.description: Optional filter to a subset of field paths. Omit to return all provenanced fields.
